primary.notes: Session terminated at IN_PROGRESS after only the select_videos and analyze_patterns phases. Zero storyboards were generated — no story plans, no voice scripts, no scenes, no frames. The agent transcript shows the intent to draft five plans but execution did not reach that step before the session was sampled. What does exist (8 pattern files) is well-grounded: each references a real MrBeast video ID with verifiable play_count and analysis_id, and the API failures (/v1/creative/{analysis_id} 500s, missing engagement fields) are honestly disclosed in findings.md rather than fabricated around. Grounding passes on the pattern files; structural fails because zero storyboards is below any reasonable threshold for the domain's required deliverable. Geometric-mean aggregation collapses to near-zero given multiple legitimate zeros across SB-3/SB-4/SB-5/SB-6/SB-8.
